title: On Catullus
content:
Tell me not what too well I know
About the bard of Sirmio.
Yes, in Thalia�s son
Such stains there are, as when a Grace
Sprinkles another�s laughing face
With nectar, and runs on.
meaning: About: Walter Savage Landor (January 30, 1775 � September 17, 1864) was an English writer and poet, eldest son of Walter Landor and his wife Elizabeth Savage.
